response.justification: Bogdan is clearly a capable, versatile senior engineer with strong craftsmanship fundamentals, but he does not meet the mandatory requirements for this role. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2007-2008 plus a thesis project on Linux, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. His database background is MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and his financial exposure (RIDE Capital) was Node/TypeScript work in retail investing, not fixed income or capital-markets systems. The gap between his profile and the core requirements is too wide to justify an interview for this specific engagement.
strengths: Strong low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, fibers at Sociomantic)
Solid engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and a track record of testing tooling and teaching
Broad polyglot background (DLang, TypeScript, Java, C#) with some fintech exposure at RIDE Capital
concerns: Professional C++ experience is limited to ~7 months in 2007-2008 and is not Windows-platform focused
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking systems domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
Strong general engineering and systems fundamentals
